explanation: TRUE POSITIVE. The claim is factually confirmed: setPoolCriteria writes new pool criteria to storage and sets isUpdateCriteriaActive = true (lines 505–507, 521–523) with no event emitted in the activation branch. The only event in the function (PoolsCriteriaUpdated, line 558) fires only after all investors are processed — potentially many transactions later due to the checkCountLimit batching mechanism. Off-chain monitoring systems receive no signal when criteria are changed or when the update process begins. The criteria changes are immediately live on-chain from the first call, making the absence of an activation event a genuine transparency gap for this admin state-changing function.
